name: Even House
address: 15771 Red Hill Ave Suite 500, Tustin, CA 92780
about: Even House is a premium members club that combines indoor golf technology with a community-oriented social space. It features state-of-the-art Trackman simulators and a nine-hole putting course for golf practice and play. The venue offers a full-service café with in-house dining, curated snacks, and a bar environment designed for both work and leisure. Membership is required for most activities, with various tiers offering different levels of access to golf amenities, workspaces, and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Trackman simulators provide accurate data and realistic course play
Exclusive putting course and chipping area for comprehensive short game practice
Private and group lessons available for skill development and coaching
Luxurious, professionally designed indoor environment for a premium golf experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full café menu with in-house made dishes, curated snacks, and fresh pastries delivered daily
Full bar service available at the venue

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade radar launch monitors providing tour-level data

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Golf balls are included with your simulator booking. Clubs can be rented for an additional fee if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full café and bar service with curated menu items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time allocation varies by membership tier, with Core members getting 60-90 minutes daily and Premium members getting 90 minutes daily. Additional time can be purchased when available.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly features or policies. It appears to be geared toward adults and professionals.
